title: Validity of Authority to Operate a Branch Office. The validity of the
content: 57 Authority to operate a Branch Office shall be coterminous with the validity of the license 58 unless sooner revoked or cancelled by the Department, or surrendered by the agency. 59 60 19 The LMA shall submit an application for renewal of Authority to Operate a Branch Office 1 within ninety (90) calendar days prior to the expiration of the validity of the license. 2 3 4 Overseas Employment and Labor Laws Compliance System 5 6 A. ASSESSMENT OF AGENCIES PRIOR TO THE ISSUANCE OF A LICENSE 7 (POST-QUALIFICATION ASSESSMENT) 8 9
